I'm a **Full Stack Software Engineer** based in Cardiff, Wales. I'm passionate about building software that's secure, scalable, and accessible, and I care just as much about the teams I build it with. Over time I've grown into **lead and mentoring roles**, and I put a lot of value on fostering inclusive, collaborative engineering teams.

Most recently I've been working with some of the biggest names in the **gaming industry** - I **led a frontend team** building a brand-new hosting platform dashboard from scratch, and worked on orchestration lambdas to bridge into legacy and modern systems across organisations, among other things.

Previously I worked alongside a Welsh Government organisation to deliver **critical national infrastructure** for flood warning systems. I played a key role building a message delivery system capable of sending over **40,000 messages across three channels in under an hour**, and in reducing message creation time from **tens of minutes to tens of seconds**. You can read the full [BJSS & NRW case study here](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/jessicaclarafealy_how-bjss-and-nrw-are-safeguarding-wales-activity-7298022225394216961-icQ_?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_ios&rcm=ACoAACqMyUsBE82sDF6bHzg2vOCGmzEssZTOwG4).
I hold a **First Class Honours degree in Computer Science** from the [University of South Wales](https://www.southwales.ac.uk/) (2022).
